questions.question: Compare rolling, blue-green, and canary deployment strategies. When should each be used?
keyPoints: Rolling: gradual replacement, no downtime, low risk
Blue-green: instant switch, instant rollback, higher resource cost
Canary: small percentage test, lowest risk, complex routing
Choose based on risk tolerance, resource constraints, rollback needs

questions.question: Design a CI/CD pipeline for a web application. Include stages, testing, and deployment strategy.
keyPoints: Build stage: compile, lint, dependency check
Test stage: unit tests, integration tests
Deploy production: manual approval or automatic for main
